scripts.dev:auth: cd backend && pnpm nest start auth --watch
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && pnpm nest start backend --watch
scripts.dev:admin: cd backend && pnpm nest start admin --watch
scripts.dev: pnpm db:up && concurrently -n "Auth,API,Admin,Web" -c "magenta,blue,cyan,green" "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:admin" "pnpm dev:frontend"
